differential_diagnoses: Nephrotic syndrome (secondary to IgA nephropathy or membranous nephropathy)
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
Chronic liver disease with portal hypertension
next_steps: Kidney biopsy with Congo red staining and immunofluorescence
Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with Congo red staining
Echocardiogram with strain imaging to evaluate for amyloid cardiomyopathy
Abdominal fat pad aspiration for Congo red staining
